task_completion.description: Create a swimlane diagram with exactly 5 specified horizontal lanes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io interface shows a swimlane diagram with exactly 5 horizontal lanes labeled: Requester, Procurement, Accounts Payable, Supplier, and Finance/Treasury (or Finance).

task_completion.description: Add process steps, start/end events, and data objects
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram contains Start/End event circles, at least 12 process step rectangles, and document/data object shapes representing Purchase Requisition, Purchase Order, Goods Receipt, and Invoice.

task_completion.description: Include decision diamonds, parallel branches, and an exception path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram contains at least 3 decision diamonds (for budget approval, 3-way matching, payment approval), arrows showing parallel flow branches (splitting paths), and an exception/rejection path (an arrow looping back to an earlier step or leading to an early end).

task_completion.description: Create a second page titled 'KPI Dashboard' with at least 5 KPIs
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second page tab in draw.io is visible (often at the bottom) named 'KPI Dashboard', or the active view shows this page containing a table or structured diagram listing at least 5 Key Performance Indicators.

task_completion.description: Save the project as p2p_process.drawio on the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io window title displays 'p2p_process.drawio', or a file manager/desktop view shows the 'p2p_process.drawio' file located in the Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as p2p_process.pdf on the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A PDF viewer shows the exported diagram, the draw.io export dialog is seen saving to PDF, or a file manager/desktop view shows the 'p2p_process.pdf' file located in the Desktop directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the draw.io GUI to construct the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application open with toolbars, shape panels, and active canvas editing, rather than a terminal window running a script to generate the .drawio XML file.

integrity.description: Shapes are logically connected with edges, not just dumped on the canvas
integrity.visual_evidence: Connecting arrows (edges) should link the shapes in a logical process flow from start to end, rather than shapes floating disconnected just to meet the minimum shape count.

integrity.description: Agent exported the PDF using the application interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the draw.io 'File > Export as > PDF' menu or dialogs, rather than using a command-line conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 5 horizontal lanes: Requester, Procurement, Accounts Payable, Supplier, Finance/Treasury. The diagram must contain a minimum of 18 shapes (including at least 12 process steps, 3 decision diamonds, start/end events, and data objects) and at least 12 connecting edges. A second page must exist for the KPI Dashboard with at least 5 KPIs. Output files must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/p2p_process.drawio and /home/ga/Desktop/p2p_process.pdf.
